stories.title: data_quality column too narrow for 'attribution_anomaly' (VARCHAR(16)<19) -- chain-blocking
acceptance: v0012 migration MODIFY both columns to VARCHAR(20), idempotent
test asserting column width >= max CHECK-permitted value length
conditionalOutcomes: if other CHECK-enum columns have the same width mismatch, fold the audit in
stories.goal: Widen drive_summary + drive_statistics data_quality columns so the tripwire can stamp 'attribution_anomaly' (unblocks US-364).

stories.title: Correct ECU seed MD335287 -> MD326328 across all code sites (A-13, all-sites-coherent)
acceptance: v0010 speed_pid_calibration seed string + comment -> MD326328
v0011 provenance re-point WHERE ecu_signature=MD335287 -> MD326328

tests updated red->green (test_ecu_model, test_migration_0011_speed_pid_rekey, test_migration_0010_speed_pid_calibration, test_speed_pid_calibration, test_stamp_ecu_swap, test_vehicle_info_ecu_lineage, test_vehicle_info_identity_immutability_enforced, test_sync_dtc_freeze_frame, test_dtc_freeze_frame_model)
pytest tests/server -m not slow green; v0010->v0011 converges, no MigrationError

validationCriteria.action: grep -rn MD335287 src/ tests/ after the change
fresh create_all + v0010->v0011 on a clean DB
validationCriteria.outcome: converges; ecu seed (MD326328,UNKCAL); speed_pid JOIN matches; no MigrationError

conditionalOutcomes: if a seed site is missed, the migration FAILs LOUDLY on a fresh DB; idempotency+backfill tests must pin the new string
if MD335287 appears anywhere else in src/ or tests/, fold it in -- the literal must be gone from code
stories.goal: Correct the new-ECU signature mis-ID MD335287 -> MD326328 (mfr E2T61683) at every code seed/identity site so fresh rebuilds seed correctly and the v0010->v0011 JOIN converges. Same-row value correction, not a new unit/reflash.

bigDefinitionOfDone: (grep -rn MD335287 src/ tests/ after the change) → (no matches (literal gone from code))  [from US-378]
(fresh create_all + v0010->v0011 on a clean DB) → (converges; ecu seed (MD326328,UNKCAL); speed_pid JOIN matches; no MigrationError)  [from US-378]
validation.validationMethod: V0.28.2 patch (drill-revealed regression + A-13 ECU-id correction): (US-377) widen data_quality VARCHAR(16)->VARCHAR(20) so recompute can stamp attribution_anomaly; (US-378) correct ECU seed MD335287->MD326328 all code sites (same-row, all-sites-coherent). On deploy: DESCRIBE varchar(20); recompute drives 23+24->attribution_anomaly, 25->full, idempotent; grep MD335287 src/ tests/ = none; v0010->v0011 converges on MD326328; releases F-005+F-007 HOLD (closes US-364 + chain pre-condition #4).
